title: BEM-774 codex patch point
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 19:26 (UTC+3)'
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists(): return {}
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
    except: return {}
prev=load('governance/state/bem773_verify_direct_dispatch_result.json')
codex=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text=codex.read_text(errors='ignore') if codex.exists() else ''
lines=text.splitlines()
name=''
for line in lines:
    if line.strip().startswith('name:'):
        name=line.split(':',1)[1].strip().strip('"').strip("'")
        break
step_names=[]
for i,line in enumerate(lines, start=1):
    if line.strip().startswith('- name:'):
        step_names.append({'line':i,'name':line.strip()[7:].strip()})
has_dispatch='dispatch_claude_internal_auditor.sh' in text or 'claude-dispatch' in text
has_ai_pat='AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT' in text
if prev.get('status')=='claude_response_found_after_direct_dispatch':
    status='real_claude_response_already_found'
    blocker=None
    next_action='process real Claude response'
elif has_dispatch:
    status='codex_runner_dispatch_already_present'
    blocker=None
    next_action='verify dispatch result again'
else:
    status='codex_runner_needs_direct_dispatch_step'
    blocker={'code':'CODEX_RUNNER_DIRECT_DISPATCH_MISSING','previous_status':prev.get('status')}
    next_action='patch codex-runner with final always step that calls scripts/dispatch_claude_internal_auditor.sh when Claude mailbox watchdog active'
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem774_next_patch_codex_runner_direct_dispatch.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-774 Next | Patch Codex Runner Direct Dispatch'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-774 CODEX PATCH POINT'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Codex workflow name: '+name+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay: forbidden.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'codex_runner_dispatch_patch_point.v1','bem':'BEM-774','status':status,'previous_bem773_status':prev.get('status'),'codex_workflow_exists':codex.exists(),'codex_workflow_name':name,'step_names_tail':step_names[-20:],'has_dispatch_step':has_dispatch,'has_ai_pat':has_ai_pat,'next_action':next_action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem774_diagnose_codex_runner_dispatch_patch_point.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem774_diagnose_codex_runner_dispatch_patch_point.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-774 | Diagnose Codex Runner Dispatch Patch Point | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Codex workflow name: '+name+sep+'Previous BEM-773: '+str(prev.get('status'))+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem774_diagnose_codex_runner_dispatch_patch_point','status':status,'previous_bem773_status':prev.get('status'),'codex_workflow_name':name,'next_action':next_action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem774_diagnose_codex_runner_dispatch_patch_point.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-774 '+status+' previous='+str(prev.get('status'))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(pending),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Diagnosed codex-runner patch point for direct Claude workflow dispatch and routed next step')
"""
